name: Boss is mad I filed slip and fall claim, can they fire me in Ogden UT?

mainEntity.name: Boss is mad I filed slip and fall claim, can they fire me in Ogden UT?

acceptedAnswer.description: **No, Utah protects against retaliation for workers' comp claims.** Firing violates law, entitles reinstatement or damages.[3] Key factors: Document threats, reduced hours. File retaliation complaint. Keep performing duties. Lawyer fights wrongful termination. Comp benefits continue.
